## @jgengine/core/runtime/motionIntents

- `MotionIntentBatch` (interface): interface MotionIntentBatch έΑΦ έγι undocumented
- `MotionIntents` (interface): interface MotionIntents έΑΦ Seam for game code to reach the motion the shell's FrameDriver otherwise owns privately (#162.4). Game code calls `impulse`, `pushHorizontal`, `setVerticalVelocity`, and/or `setY` from `onTick` or commands; the shell calls `takePending()` once per frame, before integrating gravity, to drain what accumulated. `setY` wins over physics for that frame; impulses add to the velocity the driver is about to integrate; a later `setVerticalVelocity` replaces that velocity outright. Horizontal pushes compose with the walk controller (#282.4): they add to its horizontal velocity and decay naturally as it re-blends toward input έΑΦ knockback, dashes, explosion shoves without raw `setPose` offsets.
- `applyHorizontalImpulses` (function): function applyHorizontalImpulses(velocityX: number, velocityZ: number, batch: MotionIntentBatch | null): readonly [number, number] έΑΦ Fold a batch's horizontal pushes into a controller's velocity pair έΑΦ shared by the walk and voxel drivers.
- `createMotionIntents` (function): function createMotionIntents(): MotionIntents έΑΦ έγι undocumented

- `GitHubUserNotFoundError` (class): class GitHubUserNotFoundError extends Error έΑΦ Thrown by resolveContributions when the user does not exist (έΗΤ 404).
- `githubContributionsHandler` (function): function githubContributionsHandler(options: { token?: string } = {}): (request: Request) => Promise<Response> έΑΦ Turnkey proxy handler έΑΦ mount at any route in any Web-`Response` server (Nitro, workers, Deno). Reads `?user=`, validates, proxies GitHub, returns JSON + CORS.
- `githubProxyHandler` (function): function githubProxyHandler(options: GitHubProxyOptions = {}): (request: Request) => Promise<Response> έΑΦ General read-only GitHub proxy: forwards `?path=/...` GETs (and GraphQL POSTs to `/graphql`) to api.github.com with the server-side token. Host-locked and GET-only, so it can only ever READ GitHub έΑΦ never an open proxy, never a write. Mount once and every client resource routes through it.

- `resolveContributions` (function): function resolveContributions(user: string, options: { token?: string } = {}): Promise<ContributionsWire> έΑΦ Server-side: fetch a user's contribution calendar via GraphQL (with token) or HTML scrape.
